id: list-chat-messages

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List a group's chat messages"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/chat/groups/{groupId}/messages"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Newest first, cursor-paginated. Requires the group to have chitchat
enabled.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
